meaning: 给他力(商标名,一种运动饮料)
examples: The tax will apply to regular and diet sodas, as well as other drinks with added sugar, such as Gatorade and iced teas.
And get some Gatorade for the kids.
But sales fell when the brand was grouped with a stable of products including Gatorade.
He lost Gatorade, General Motors, Accenture and Gillette, but still has Nike, EA Sports and Rolex.
